description: Executed TASK-FULL-CYCLE-TEST-0001 ledger router and ledger writer with next actor governance contract implementation as roadmap item 11. Created governance/ledger_router_contract.md on main branch establishing comprehensive ledger routing and writing governance system: (1) Ledger router protocol defining automated routing decisions based on event_type, actor_role, and task status with deterministic next_actor_role assignment; (2) Ledger writer contract specifying structured ledger entry creation with mandatory schema_version v164, parent_event_id chains, and commit_sha references; (3) Next actor governance mechanism ensuring proper role transitions through routing_decision_basis documentation and next_expected_event validation; (4) Router decision matrix mapping event types to appropriate next actors with conflict resolution protocols; (5) Writer validation rules enforcing ledger integrity through entry format compliance and chain verification. Governance contract enables autonomous ledger management with traceable routing decisions and structured entry creation following established executor-auditor exchange protocols.
